description.value: Target one Tiny beast you can see within close range. The beast travels to a location you specify (must be familiar to you) and delivers a message of up to 25 words to a creature you describe. The beast travels at 50 miles per day (fly) or 25 miles per day (ground).

system.effect: Target one Tiny beast you can see within close range. The beast travels to a location you specify (must be familiar to you) and delivers a message of up to 25 words to a creature you describe. The beast travels at 50 miles per day (fly) or 25 miles per day (ground).
system.weavingRoll: Positive Potential + Positive Mastery / Space Potential + Space Mastery
